title: MEMORY_SHARED_WORKING content
description: Working memory shared across multiple agents (cf. LatentMAS shared latent working memory). References the participating agents and the transport used to exchange internal representations.

participants.description: ERC-8004 identities sharing this working memory.

transport.description: How internal state is exchanged; 'latent' = lossless hidden-state/KV-cache passing (LatentMAS).
